cycle_notes: v3->v4: 7 validated changes. 2 confirmed (2-agent), 4 single-agent accepted, 1 Claude trap fix. TRAP DISABLED (was causing 5 missed values at EHS 0.84-0.96). Aggression tiers now fire correctly. fold_rate v3=46.7%, bad_folds=3, missed_val=5.
core_principle: Bet aggressively when strong. All-in when near-certain. Never trap without opponent data. Speculative hands see the flop.

speculative_hand_see_flop.note: Connectors (gap<=2) and broadway (rank>=T) get discounted EHS threshold. Suited hands get +0.04 EHS bonus.

preflop.reasoning: v4: open_ip 0.50->0.45, open_oop 0.60->0.55, call_ip 0.52->0.48, call_oop 0.63->0.58. Continues loosening on strong cross-version trend.

flop.reasoning: TRAP DISABLED (1.0 = never fires). Was trapping EHS 0.88+ IP, causing 5 missed values. Aggression tiers now bet/raise strong hands directly. fold_max 0.40->0.35 (2-agent confirmed).

turn.reasoning: TRAP DISABLED. Strong hands now hit aggression tiers (large bet / all-in) instead of checking.

river.reasoning: facing_bet_raise_min 0.88->0.85 (more aggressive raises on river). River aggression tiers: EHS>=0.90 -> all-in.

aggression.note: EHS>=0.90 -> all-in. EHS>=0.78 -> 1.2x pot. EHS>=0.65 -> 0.75x pot. Fires on ALL streets when not facing a bet. Trap disabled so these always trigger for strong hands.

pot_odds.note: Felt ReaderL4 style: if EHS >= required_equity * margin, call is profitable regardless of fixed threshold. Margin 1.05 = need 5% edge over breakeven. Fires as secondary check after fixed thresholds.

history_review.note: Pipeline reads v1+v2+v3+... logs. 3 parallel DeepSeek agents (theory/pattern/simulation) + orchestrator.

constraints: NEVER raise or bet without EHS meeting the minimum for that street
NEVER call if pot odds require equity we do not have
NEVER bluff unless bluff_enabled=true AND specific conditions are met
NEVER trap without per-hand opponent aggression data — trap_min_ehs is set to 1.0 (disabled)
ALWAYS use aggression tiers when strong: EHS>=0.90 all-in, EHS>=0.78 large bet, EHS>=0.65 medium bet
ALWAYS overbet when board pairs our hole cards and EHS above board_hit threshold
ALWAYS give connectors (gap<=2) and broadway (rank>=T) a chance to see the flop
NEVER fold a speculative hand preflop without checking the see-flop bonus
